news.headline: Jacksonville certified as a Gigabit City by Metronet, $20 million invested, offering ultra-high-speed network to community.
news.summary: Metronet recently announced that the City of Jacksonville, N.C., has been designated as a Certified Gigabit City Powered by Metronet. This milestone signifies the availability of the company’s ultra-high-speed, multi-gigabit fiber-optic network to a significant portion of households and businesses in the area. The $20 million investment made by Metronet has facilitated this expansion, enabling improved connectivity for the community. In a meeting with the city council, the certification was officially recognized, highlighting the partnership between Jacksonville and Metronet in enhancing digital infrastructure.

news.headline: Wrike to showcase collaboration solutions at TSIA World ENVISION 2024. Gold sponsorship announced, booth #515.
news.summary: In San Diego, Wrike, a leading work management platform, revealed its gold sponsorship at TSIA World ENVISION, happening from October 21-23 in Las Vegas. Wrike will be present at booth #515 in the Bristlecone Ballroom Expo, highlighting methods for businesses to enhance client service processes for improved operational outcomes. TSIA World ENVISION focuses on upcoming business prospects, with Wrike's involvement emphasizing forward-thinking strategies.

news.headline: Global wind energy capacity reached 743 gigawatts in 2020, showing a significant increase.
IMF Fiscal Affairs Director Gaspar: US debt path cannot continue to rise forever, but is currently sustainable.
Legal firm FNF files market manipulation case for Quantum Biopharma against CIBC, alleging financial fraud.
news.summary: A legal case was filed on Sunday by Freedman Normand Friedland LLP ("FNF") and co-counsel Christian Attar on behalf of Quantum Biopharma Ltd. (Nasdaq: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) against CIBC World Markets, Inc. ("CIBC"). The case involves allegations of market manipulation. No specific details on the nature of the alleged manipulation were provided in the report. The case points to potential wrongdoing by CIBC World Markets, Inc. and its involvement in activities affecting the market. Quantum Biopharma Ltd. is seeking legal recourse for damages incurred. The case signifies a significant development in the legal realm and financial sector, shedding light on potential illicit practices within the market.

news.headline: Blake Lively introduces Betty Booze and Betty Buzz sparkling drinks to Princess Cruises' Love Line Premium Liquors collection. #HighQuality #ReducedAlcohol
news.summary: Betty Booze and Betty Buzz sparkling drinks are now available, boasting high-quality, clean ingredients and reduced alcohol content. Made by "Love Line Premium Liquors," a collection by Princess Cruises, these drinks offer a unique and curated experience. This announcement was made in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida, on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Four Seasons Hotel's BKK Social Club (#12) and VIRTÙ (#42) make World's 50 Best Bars List 2024.
news.summary: The BKK Social Club located at Four Seasons Hotel Bangkok and VIRTÙ at Four Seasons Hotel Tokyo at Otemachi have been honored, securing ranks #12 and #42 respectively on the prestigious 2024 World's 50 Best Bars List. This recognition is a testament to the excellence of Four Seasons in the global hospitality industry. The announcement was made in Toronto on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Focused Energy will invest $65 million to build a laser fusion facility in the Bay Area to further advancements.
news.summary: A laser fusion company has announced plans to establish a $65 million facility in the Bay Area. This move is expected to draw top-tier talent and capitalize on the significant progress made at the National Ignition Facility in 2022. The company, Focused Energy, aims to further advance laser fusion technology. The facility's location in the Bay Area positions it strategically within a hub of innovation and expertise, setting the stage for groundbreaking developments in the field.

news.headline: Shell to acquire 100% equity stake in RISEC Holdings, owning 609MW gas turbine power plant in US trading market.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Shell Energy North America (US), L.P. (SENA), a subsidiary of Shell plc, announced the acquisition of a 100% equity stake in RISEC Holdings, LLC (RISEC). This acquisition includes a two-unit combined-cycle gas turbine power plant with a capacity of 609 megawatts (MW) located in Houston.

news.headline: Over 1 billion records stolen in 2024; Tech fighting back against cybercrime.
news.summary: According to a recent report by TechCrunch, over 1 billion records have been stolen in 2024, and this number is on the rise. This data breach highlights the increasing challenges of cybersecurity. Earlier in the year, the situation was already alarming, and the trend shows no signs of slowing down. The impact of these cybercrimes is significant and emphasizes the urgent need for enhanced security measures to protect sensitive information.

news.headline: WOW! introduces fiber internet to Hernando County, Florida with 10th Greenfield community, expanding its network. (Characters: 111)
news.summary: Spring Hill becomes the 10th Greenfield community in Florida to gain access to the advanced all-fiber network provided by WOW! Internet, TV & Phone. The announcement was made on October 23, 2024, by the broadband services provider, WOW! The company's all-fiber services are now accessible in Spring Hill, marking a significant milestone in expanding connectivity options.

news.headline: Choice Hotels opens 500th Extended Stay Property, Everhome Suites Glendale. Fastest growing in the industry with strong returns on investment.
news.summary: Choice has emerged as the leader in the extended stay industry, boasting the fastest-growing economy portfolio. Additionally, it currently leads in economy new construction within this sector. The company's extended stay hotels have been pivotal in delivering impressive returns on investment and gross operating profit. The North Bethesda-based company made this announcement on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Tolmar partners with UpScriptHealth for telehealth access to JATENZO® oral testosterone therapy.
news.summary: Telehealth consultations now allow men to obtain JATENZO® oral testosterone replacement therapy. Tolmar, Inc. has introduced this service in Buffalo Grove, Illinois, and Scottsdale, Arizona. The announcement was made on October 23, 2024, through a PRNewswire release. Tolmar is a pharmaceutical company facilitating the telemedicine service.

news.headline: Department of Defense awards Astra $44M contract to advance launch systems; aims to launch Rocket 4 globally from US, Australia.
news.summary: Astra, a prominent company specializing in launch services and spacecraft engines, has recently disclosed being granted a contract by the Defense Innovation Unit (DIU). The contract has a maximum value of $44 million and is designated to enhance and broaden the production capacities of Astra’s distinctive tactically responsive launch system. The primary aim is to accomplish the prototype goal of launching Rocket 4 into orbit or suborbit from various locations such as the US, Australia, and others. This significant contract award demonstrates the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the aerospace industry.

news.headline: Free Xtalks webinar on accelerating clinical trials with 3 strategies for faster market access and improved patient outcomes.
news.summary: Join our upcoming webinar to discover three groundbreaking strategies aimed at accelerating clinical trials, reducing time-to-market, and improving patient outcomes. This session will unveil the benefits of utilizing a full-service contract research organization (CRO) and contract development and manufacturing. Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your clinical trial process.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on how multi-modal data innovate life sciences. Learn challenges, opportunities, and practical applications.
news.summary: Discover the possibilities of utilizing multi-modal data in life sciences research in an upcoming webinar. Participants will delve into the benefits and obstacles of leveraging such data, with featured speakers offering real-world examples to highlight its potential impact. Join to explore how combining different data sets can revolutionize research in this field.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on transitioning drug products into prefilled blow-fill-seal devices - covers material compatibility, processes, and drug stability.
news.summary: This webinar is offering free insight into the technical aspects surrounding the transition of drug products. Topics covered include material compatibility, process parameters, and their impact on drug stability and integrity. Participants will learn how to identify and address potential issues through this educational session.

news.headline: Webinar by Xtalks discusses challenges & progress in psychedelics: FDA action on Lykos' MDMA for PTSD treatment.
news.summary: Discover valuable information from the latest advisory committee (ADCOM) meeting and the recent action letter from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regarding Lykos' new drug application (NDA) for utilizing 3,4-methylenedioxymethamphetamine (MDMA) to address post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD). Gain insights into the discussions and decisions following this meeting, which plays a crucial role in guiding the development and approval process for this treatment. Stay informed about the progress of this groundbreaking therapy that could potentially provide relief for individuals suffering from PTSD.

news.headline: Top 25 Cybersecurity Consultants and Leaders of 2024 announced by The Consulting Report. New York, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: The Consulting Report is excited to reveal the Top 25 Cybersecurity Consultants and Leaders for the year 2024 in New York City. This prestigious list acknowledges the top professionals in the field, recognizing their expertise and contributions to the industry. Cyber threats continue to rise, underscoring the critical importance of cybersecurity. The individuals on this list have demonstrated exceptional skills and leadership in safeguarding digital assets. The selection process involved evaluating numerous candidates based on their experience, innovation, and impact on the cybersecurity landscape. These 25 experts stand out for their dedication to protecting against cyber threats and ensuring the security of organizations.

news.headline: Miva named among 2024 Best and Brightest Companies to Work For® for 7th year, highlighting commitment to innovative workplace culture.

This acknowledgement comes amidst Miva, Inc.'s continuous commitment to innovation and growth in the ecommerce industry. The award was received in San Diego on October 23, 2024, emphasizing Miva's position as a top ecommerce software and service provider catering to mid-size businesses. The accolade underscores the company's focus on creating a flexible and supportive workplace culture for professionals in the field.

news.summary: A renowned timepiece brand with 143 years of history has collaborated with leading Japanese creatives to explore the concept of "Time." In Tokyo on October 23, 2024, Seiko Group Corporation launched a short film titled "THE GIFT OF TIME," featuring insights from prominent cultural figures.

news.headline: 2024 Public Relations and Marketing Excellence Awards winners revealed by Business Intelligence Group in Philadelphia.
news.summary: The Business Intelligence Group has recognized the leaders driving business success through strategic communication and impactful campaigns. The 2024 Public Relations and Marketing winners were revealed on October 23 in Philadelphia. These innovators were honored for their contributions towards achieving measurable results and delivering effective messaging.

This hub will concentrate on practical and safe AI applications, specifically in content creation and experience development. The lab aims to explore the merging of new concepts and technologies.

news.headline: Orion Ascent 2025 event to empower advisors with insights and technology. Keynote speakers and agenda announced. 1,500 participants expected. Hyatt Regency Orlando, Feb 3-6, 2025.
news.summary: Orion, the leading wealthtech solutions provider for financial advisors and enterprise firms, revealed the lineup of keynote speakers and the complete agenda for Orion Ascent 2025. The event, slated to occur from February 3-6, 2025, at the Hyatt Regency Orla, is expected to draw over 1,500 attendees, including firm leaders, enterprise executives, and top advisors. Participants can now view all sessions available for the event.

news.headline: Twelve Labs partners with Mimir to enhance video content understanding; integration aims to increase discoverability for customers.
news.summary: Twelve Labs, a video search and understanding company based in San Francisco, revealed a new integration partnership on October 23, 2024. This collaboration focuses on boosting the discoverability of customers' content to enhance its utility. The partnership involves joining forces with a cloud-native asset management company. This move is expected to amplify the reach of customers' content, making it more accessible and relevant. Through this integration, Twelve Labs aims to provide a seamless and efficient experience for users, potentially driving increased engagement and usage of the platform.

news.headline: Phenom Talent CRM awarded Best Use of AI in HR by The 2024 A.I. Awards in Philadelphia. Characters: 76
news.summary: Philadelphia-based company Phenom Talent CRM has been recognized for its innovative use of artificial intelligence in HR by winning the Best Use of AI in HR award at The 2024 A.I. Awards. The award highlights the company's success in incorporating AI technology into their talent management tools, showcasing their leadership in the HR tech industry. The prestigious accolade acknowledges Phenom's commitment to leveraging AI to improve HR processes and enhance recruitment efforts. This achievement demonstrates the company's dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements in the HR sector.

news.headline: Kansas City real estate investor Scott Asner of Eighteen Capital Group recognizes National Work and Family Month.
news.summary: Kansas City resident and real estate investor, Scott Asner, who is the Founding Principal of Eighteen Capital Group (18CG), shows support for National Work and Family Month. The acknowledgment was made in LEAWOOD, Kan., on October 23, 2024. Additionally, Scott Asner is the Principal of Eighteen Capital Group.

news.headline: AgTechLogic's AI-powered Agtellio platform revolutionizes farming with precision spraying. CTO Justin Hoffman presents tech-integrated farming vision at ASHS. (Characters: 139)
news.summary: The Chief Technology Officer, Justin Hoffman, delivered a keynote presentation at the American Society for Horticultural Science conference in Mesa, Arizona on October 23, 2024. The speech focused on "A Vision for the Future: Tech-Integrated Farming Operations." AgTechLogic, a prominent sustainable agricultural company known for its intelligent precision farming solutions, was highlighted during the event. The presentation discussed the integration of technology in farming practices to enhance sustainability and efficiency. The event attracted a significant audience, with over 500 industry professionals and experts in attendance. This highlights the growing interest and importance of incorporating technology into the agriculture sector for future advancements.

The program recognized outstanding home care aides from more than 15 organizations, highlighting excellence in the industry.

news.summary: A recent investment highlights the quick expansion in AI-driven ordering and self-service technology, driving the upcoming surge in restaurant innovation. Checkmate, a top provider of integrated ordering solutions for large-scale restaurants, revealed on October 23, 2024, that...

news.headline: Research identifies 7 deadly sins in emotionless advertising; "The Emotion Effect" educates brand marketers on brand growth. NY, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A newly released white paper titled "The Emotion Effect" aims to enlighten brand marketers on the driving forces behind brand growth. Released on October 23, 2024, in New York, the paper emphasizes the perpetual dilemma faced by marketers regarding the balance between immediate sales boosts and sustained brand development. The document sheds light on the key factors that contribute to brand expansion, along with highlighting the pitfalls that can hinder progress. Through this educational resource, marketers are provided with valuable insights to navigate these challenges effectively.

news.headline: Vacuum Interrupters launches RVI-WL-35925A replacement vacuum interrupter for Powell PowlVac 05PV50 circuit breakers.
news.summary: The RVI-WL-35925A is designed for Powell PowlVac 05PV50 vacuum circuit breakers. Situated in Farmers Branch, Texas, on October 23, 2024, Vacuum Interrupters is a prominent producer of replacement vacuum interrupters, pole assemblies, parts, and components for medium-voltage applications.

news.headline: Anonybit now offers iris and voice recognition in decentralized biometric platform for enhanced security.
news.summary: Anonybit's decentralized biometric identity platform will be featured at Money 20/20, boasting new support for iris and voice recognition. This enhancement is aimed at providing enterprises with enhanced flexibility, privacy, and security across various applications. The development is set to be unveiled in New York and Tel Aviv, Israel on Oct. 23, 2024. The additions aim to offer unparalleled biometric support to businesses, catering to multiple use cases and ensuring robust protection of sensitive data.

news.headline: Merk Investments webinar on Gold Miners analysis featuring ASA Gold & Precious Metals Limited on Oct 30, 2024.
news.summary: Merk Investments, based in Menlo Park, California, is set to hold a webinar on Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 4:15pm ET, focusing on Investing in Gold Miners. The webinar will delve into Merk's management of ASA Gold & and will provide insights into the gold mining sector.

news.headline: Key Executives announces Top 25 Tech CEOs of Boston for 2024. Boston is a tech innovation hub.
news.summary: Key Executives has unveiled the list of The Top 25 Tech CEOs of Boston for 2024, affirming Boston's status as a prominent tech innovation hub. The rankings recognize the exceptional leadership of these CEOs in driving technological advancements. The selection process involved evaluating a pool of notable candidates, resulting in a diverse and accomplished cohort representing various tech sectors. The list showcases the top talent shaping Boston's tech landscape and features CEOs from companies spanning software development, AI, biotech, and more. This annual recognition highlights the significant contributions of these individuals and their firms to the region's thriving tech scene.

news.headline: BlueConic appoints Geana Barbosa as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth. Joined on Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: BlueConic, a prominent customer data operating system based in Boston, recently appointed Geana Barbosa, a former executive at Hootsuite and LinkedIn, as its Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) on October 23, 2024. This strategic move is expected to drive growth and revenue for the company.

news.headline: Nigeria's gift card industry to reach $2.1 billion in 2024 with 12.0% annual growth rate, expected to have 10.2% CAGR in 2024-2028.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Nigeria Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q2 2024 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The gift card sector in the region is projected to increase by 12.0% annually, reaching a value of US$2.1 billion by 2024. Nigeria's gift card industry is predicted to maintain growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.2% anticipated during the period of 2024-2028. The gift card market within the country is expected to see significant expansion.

news.headline: DHL and Diageo NA plan to add two hydrogen-powered trucks to their U.S. fleet in a sustainability partnership.
news.summary: In Westerville, Ohio, DHL Supply Chain and Diageo North America have revealed intentions to add two fuel cell electric trucks running on hydrogen to their fleet in the United States.

news.headline: Enphase Energy stock plunges after Q3 results: Revenue below estimates at $380.9M, EPS at 65 cents vs est of 77 cents.
news.summary: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ:ENPH) saw a decline in shares on Wednesday following the release of disappointing financial results for Q3. The company reported a revenue of $380.9 million, falling short of the estimated $391.979 million. Additionally, the Q3 EPS stood at 65 cents, below the projected 77 cents. In the U.S., revenue saw a 43% increase compared to the previous quarter, driven by higher shipments to distributors. However, European revenues dropped by about 15% quarter-over-quarter due to weakened demand in the region. Enphase shipped 172.9 megawatt hours of IQ batteries in the quarter. The stock experienced a selloff as several analyst firms downgraded or reduced price targets on the company.

news.headline: Mortgage applications fell for the fourth consecutive week; they dropped by 6.7% with refinance applications decreasing by 8.5%.
news.summary: The recent increase in mortgage rates has caused a significant decline in mortgage applications in the U.S. over the past four weeks. In the week ending Oct. 18, mortgage applications fell by 6.7%, following a 17% drop from the previous week. This includes an 8.5% decrease in applications to refinance existing home loans and a 5% decline in applications for new home purchases. The rise in interest rates to two-month highs has discouraged potential buyers from entering the housing market. This trend highlights the growing pressure from elevated borrowing costs on homebuyers.

news.headline: New campaign "Abortion In America" launched to highlight impact of post-Roe abortion bans, aiming to change minds.
news.summary: A recent initiative called Abortion in America: Stories Igniting a Movement aims to amplify personal accounts showcasing the negative impacts of abortion bans. This national campaign, launched on October 23, 2024, is focused on raising awareness and advocating for reproductive freedom. By sharing real-life experiences, the initiative seeks to shift public opinion and garner more support for women's reproductive rights. Through personal stories, this movement aims to highlight the importance of upholding access to safe and legal abortion services across the country.

news.headline: Global next-generation titrator market valued at USD 3.07 billion in 2023, expected to grow at 7.7% CAGR by 2030. Major players include Hanna, Metrohm, Xylem, & Thermo Scientific Orion.
news.summary: A report titled "Global Next-generation Titrator Market 2024 Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Next-generation Titrator was worth USD 3.07 billion in 2023 and is projected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.7% from 2025 to 2030. This market has experienced significant expansion recently due to a rise in demand in various applications and industries.

news.headline: IMF Fiscal Affairs Director Gaspar: The UK is living with high interest rates and low growth, with public investment badly needed
IMF Fiscal Affairs Director Gaspar: The UK has debts substantially higher than projected before the pandemic.
Alpine Power Systems re-certified for ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001. Verified by third-party audits.
news.summary: Alpine Power Systems, based in Detroit, has recently achieved recertification for three ISO standards - ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001. The recertification was confirmed after thorough audits by independent third-party specialists. This accomplishment strengthens the company's commitment to quality management, environmental standards, and occupational health and safety.

news.headline: Lithia Motors (NYSE:LAD) Q3 earnings beat estimates with EPS of $8.21, sales of $9.221 billion. Revenue segments up: New vehicles (+14%), Used vehicles retail (+8.5%), Used vehicles wholesale (+23.7%), Aftersales (+20.9%). Adjusted net income at $222 million, 14% down from 2023. After sales gross profit increased by 6.3%.
news.summary: Lithia Motors, Inc. (NYSE:LAD) posted third-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $8.21, surpassing the estimated $7.60. Earnings were uplifted by 11 cents due to unrealized investment and foreign currency exchange gains. Despite quarterly sales reaching $9.221 billion, marking an 11% increase, this fell short of the expected $9.482 billion. Breakdown of revenue segments showed growth in New vehicle retail (+14%), Used vehicle retail (+8.5%), Used vehicle wholesale (+23.7%), Finance and insurance (+3.1%), Aftersales (+20.9%), while Fleet and other experienced a decrease of 31.4%. Adjusted net income stood at $222 million, down by 14% from the same period in 2023. Aftersales gross profit rose by 6.3% on a same-store basis. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Marketing professors' research shows food apps impact brand loyalty. Online food delivery industry valued at $1.02 trillion.
news.summary: In October 23, 2024, in Jacksonville, Florida, it's becoming increasingly common for people to opt for the convenience of ordering food through third-party apps like DoorDash rather than dining out. This marked a significant trend in the online food delivery industry, estimated to be valued at $1.02 trillion in the previous year.

news.headline: Global G-3 PLC market valued at $510.66 million, expected to grow at 6.7% CAGR by 2030 fueled by smart grid demand.
news.summary: The market for G-3 PLC Solutions is poised for substantial growth, as evidenced by its valuation at USD 510.66 million and projected CAGR of 6.7% from 2025 to 2030. This information comes from a recent report titled "Global G-3 PLC Solution Market (2024 Edition): Market Size, Trends, Opportunities and Forecast by Application, Industry, Component, Region, By Country: 2020-2030." The surge in the demand for smart grid technology has been a key driver behind the remarkable expansion of the G-3 PLC (Power Line Communication) Solution market.

news.headline: Rhino introduces 'Guided Claims' to help landlords & property managers save time & money in claims processing.
news.summary: A recent product enhancement has been introduced to simplify the creation and submission of claims forms, benefitting property managers with time and cost savings through Rhino's advanced security deposit solutions platform. This development was unveiled in New York on October 23, 2024, by Rhino, a leader in security deposit insurance, aiming to enhance efficiency in property management.

news.headline: Voters in 41 states to decide on 146 ballot measures in 2024 election, covering various issues such as abortion and RCV.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Middleton, Wisconsin, marked the upcoming general election on November 5 where voters in 41 states will have a say on 146 statewide ballot measures. The ballot measures cover a range of topics such as abortion, ranked-choice voting (RCV), non-citizen voting, criminal justice reforms, wages, and more. These critical decisions will impact various policies and laws across the states, highlighting the significance of voter participation.
